recommendations.title: Mater the Greater
recommendations.overview: Mater tells Lightning McQueen about his former job as a daredevil.

recommendations.title: Rescue Squad Mater
recommendations.overview: Lightning McQueen and Mater are driving in Radiator Springs and drive past Red, who is hosing some plants near Stanley. Mater tells Lightning that he used to be a firetruck, but Lightning doesn't believe Mater.

recommendations.title: Heavy Metal Mater
recommendations.overview: Mater and Lightning McQueen are ready to rock! When Mater's garage band, Mater and the Gas Caps, records a hit song, Mater becomes a rock legend. Then Lightning joins Mater's band for the rock concert of the century!

recommendations.title: El Materdor
recommendations.overview: Mater is a matador fighting a herd of bulldozers in Spain. When Lightning McQueen enters the story, the bulldozers begin to chase him due to his red paint.

recommendations.title: Cars 2
recommendations.overview: Star race car Lightning McQueen and his pal Mater head overseas to compete in the World Grand Prix race. But the road to the championship becomes rocky as Mater gets caught up in an intriguing adventure of his own: international espionage.

recommendations.title: Cars Toon Mater's Tall Tales
recommendations.overview: Mater the tow truck travels from country to country as he retells his infamous but unbelievable stories.
recommendations.director: Rob Gibbs, Victor Navone, John Lasseter

recommendations.title: Cars
recommendations.overview: Lightning McQueen, a hotshot rookie race car driven to succeed, discovers that life is about the journey, not the finish line, when he finds himself unexpectedly detoured in the sleepy Route 66 town of Radiator Springs. On route across the country to

recommendations.title: Tokyo Mater
recommendations.overview: A routine tow lands Mater in Tokyo, where he is challenged to a drift-style race against a nefarious gang leader and his posse of ninjas. With the help of his friend, 'Dragon' Lightning McQueen, and some special modifications, Mater attempts to drift

recommendations.title: Toy Story
recommendations.overview: Led by Woody, Andy's toys live happily in his room until Andy's birthday brings Buzz Lightyear onto the scene. Afraid of losing his place in Andy's heart, Woody plots against Buzz. But when circumstances separate Buzz and Woody from their owner, the

recommendations.title: A Bug's Life
recommendations.overview: On behalf of "oppressed bugs everywhere," an inventive ant named Flik hires a troupe of warrior bugs to defend his bustling colony from a horde of freeloading grasshoppers led by the evil-minded Hopper.
